title: Senior/ Architect (With/ Without QP Qualification)
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION:

  • Research, plan, and develop architectural designs, ensuring alignment with project requirements.
  • Execute design, submission, and implementation phases of projects.
  • Generate CAD drawings, renderings, layouts, and color boards to facilitate client discussions.
  • Compile data and perform necessary calculations for drawing preparation and design layouts.
  • Draft initial design concepts and propose product solutions based on project requirements.
  • Ensure adherence to design specifications, relevant codes, and standards for authorities’ submissions and construction compliance.
  • Attend meetings and engage with clients, consultants, and contractors to coordinate project details effectively.
  • Collaborate with team members and clients to develop and execute project designs efficiently.

QUALIFICATIONS REQUIREMENT:

  • Bachelor's degree in Architecture or equivalent qualification.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office and software like AutoCAD, Revit, and Adobe.
  • Familiarity with building codes and regulatory standards.
  • Strong technical and design aptitude.
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving abilities.
  • Effective communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Ability to work both independently and collaboratively.
  • Minimum of 2 years of relevant experience.

If interested, please submit your application to cvs@jdawms.com with your expected salary and resume.

We regret that only short-listed candidates will be contacted shortly. By submitting your application or resume, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and sharing of your personal information with potential employers for their assessment.

JDA WMS Pte Ltd | EA Personnel: Pham Thi Tuyet Mai 

EA License No: 23S1595 | EA Registration No: R25127838
